description: Machine-readable fuzz campaign evidence + crash->regression manifest (Bastion B15). Backs docs/FUZZ_INFRASTRUCTURE.md and is gated by ci/check_fuzz_campaign_status.py (also audit_gate.py --fuzz-campaign-status, principle G-15). Each row binds a fuzz surface/harness to its committed corpus/harness evidence, a crash-artifact directory, the regression evidence that converts crashes into permanent tests, a replay command, a freshness SLO, and a severity. CAAS uses this to know whether fuzz evidence is current and whether any crash artifact remains unconverted into a regression. This is an EVIDENCE-STATUS gate: it does NOT run long fuzz campaigns on push.

severity_legend.blocking: Core parser / signing / ABI fuzz surface; missing corpus/harness, stale last_verified, or an unconverted crash artifact fails the gate.
severity_legend.warning: Stateful / heavier fuzz surface; staleness/missing is advisory + pre-alerted (still fails on an unconverted crash).
severity_legend.owner_gated: Heavy differential / host-only (--gpu) fuzz surface; reported explicitly and never counted as current evidence on push.

rows.notes: Invalid-input rejection verifier + adversarial-protocol hostile-caller regression. FFI corpus exercised by the audit fuzz suite on every push; ci-evidence snapshot refreshed 2026-06-13.
DER parse differential regression. fuzz_parsers ci-evidence snapshot (580019 cases) refreshed 2026-06-13.
ECDSA DER-confusion regression; libfuzzer + cflite exercise the verify/sign surface in CI.
Schnorr variable-length CT-fix regression; libfuzzer + cflite exercise the verify/sign surface in CI.
Stateful MuSig2/FROST session fuzz; heavier, advisory severity. Nonce-strict regression.

rows.target: libbitcoin bridge batch verify fuzz / consensus differential
rows.notes: Heavy libbitcoin consensus-differential fuzz; owner-gated manual / imported artifact, not run on push.

No dedicated GPU public-data libFuzzer harness; GPU verify operates on public data (variable-time correct). Secret-bearing GPU paths are validated host-only via --gpu white-box CT-uniformity. Owner-gated; never current evidence on push.
